initiatives.name: Civic Media Center
initiatives.description: alternative library + mutual aid + zines + music + community space

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Gainesville
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Gainesville. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: The Gainesville Iguana
initiatives.description: Gainesville, Florida's progressive events calendar and newsletter since 1986

initiatives.name: Florida Prisoner Solidarity
initiatives.description: Organizing alongside Florida prisoners for a world without cages. Join us for letter writing every 4th Tuesday, 6pm at CMC.

initiatives.name: Yard Sales 4 Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Mutual aid group collecting donations from neighbors and using the proceeds for mutual aid causes

initiatives.name: Florida Abolitionist Gathering (FAG)
initiatives.description: Join us for workshops, discussions, networking, caucuses, scheming, action, ritual, and communal grief and joy.

initiatives.name: Gainesville Free Grocery Store
initiatives.description: We are making nutritious food free and abundant in Gainesville communities!

initiatives.name: The Liberation Collective
initiatives.description: A coalition hosting actions in Gainesville, Florida. Education | Culture | Activism | Service
